records.m_Talk_ENG: As you may already know, many suffered unfortunate tragedies during the Great Purification War.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As you may already know, many suffered unfortunate tragedies during the Great Purification War.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As you may already know, many suffered unfortunate tragedies during the Great Purification War.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At that time, we were all victims. Young children could not survive unless someone assisted them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At that time, we were all victims. Young children could not survive unless someone assisted them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At that time, we were all victims. Young children could not survive unless someone assisted them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Many of the sisters who have settled here were the children from that era.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Many of the sisters who have settled here were the children from that era.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Many of the sisters who have settled here were the children from that era.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sister Primer was also one of them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sister Primer was also one of them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sister Primer was also one of them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: From a young age, Sister Primer had a strong sense of justice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: From a young age, Sister Primer had a strong sense of justice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: From a young age, Sister Primer had a strong sense of justice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At the age of ten, she fought against gangsters while bringing back the children who snuck out...
records.m_Talk_DEU: At the age of ten, she fought against gangsters while bringing back the children who snuck out...
records.m_Talk_FRA: At the age of ten, she fought against gangsters while bringing back the children who snuck out...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And on the year of her coming of age ceremony, she even chased out a terrorist organization that was trying to take over the monastery.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And on the year of her coming of age ceremony, she even chased out a terrorist organization that was trying to take over the monastery.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And on the year of her coming of age ceremony, she even chased out a terrorist organization that was trying to take over the monastery.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, I am proud of her. Looking at Sister Primer, I am confident that she would not turn her back on any injustice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, I am proud of her. Looking at Sister Primer, I am confident that she would not turn her back on any injustice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, I am proud of her. Looking at Sister Primer, I am confident that she would not turn her back on any injustice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is also why I am concerned about her. One day, she will destroy herself by attempting to handle justice she is incapable of handling.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is also why I am concerned about her. One day, she will destroy herself by attempting to handle justice she is incapable of handling.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is also why I am concerned about her. One day, she will destroy herself by attempting to handle justice she is incapable of handling.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So when the priests of the Holy Curia came to visit, I made Sister Primer take the test.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So when the priests of the Holy Curia came to visit, I made Sister Primer take the test.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So when the priests of the Holy Curia came to visit, I made Sister Primer take the test.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If she were to become an official exorcist and gain the necessary strength, her righteousness would grow even stronger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If she were to become an official exorcist and gain the necessary strength, her righteousness would grow even stronger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If she were to become an official exorcist and gain the necessary strength, her righteousness would grow even stronger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you have done your research, you will understand that becoming an exorcist is not an easy task. Above all, one must pass three tests before being recognized by the Holy Curia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you have done your research, you will understand that becoming an exorcist is not an easy task. Above all, one must pass three tests before being recognized by the Holy Curia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you have done your research, you will understand that becoming an exorcist is not an easy task. Above all, one must pass three tests before being recognized by the Holy Curia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sister Primer may have failed her final exam, but after much deliberation, the priests decided to accept her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sister Primer may have failed her final exam, but after much deliberation, the priests decided to accept her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sister Primer may have failed her final exam, but after much deliberation, the priests decided to accept her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps it is because the previous two tests sufficiently demonstrated her qualifications to become an exorcist.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps it is because the previous two tests sufficiently demonstrated her qualifications to become an exorcist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps it is because the previous two tests sufficiently demonstrated her qualifications to become an exorcist.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What was the last test she failed, you ask?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What was the last test she failed, you ask?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What was the last test she failed, you ask?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, even the courageous Sister Primer is afraid of something.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, even the courageous Sister Primer is afraid of something.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, even the courageous Sister Primer is afraid of something.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A cat?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you the manager?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you the manager?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tedious tasks like managing are done by my subject, Gremory. But she's out right now.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Tedious tasks like managing are done by my subject, Gremory. But she's out right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the manager is your subject, what do you do, little lady?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can make sweet juice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can make sweet juice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can make sweet juice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess, being as cute as you are, you would still attract a large number of customers even if you did nothing.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess, being as cute as you are, you would still attract a large number of customers even if you did nothing.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Hao dayr you. Hao dayr you pin'h ma sheeks la'ch dat?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, right. This is a dessert we make at our cafe. It's a special canap959 topped with cheese and blueberries.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, right. This is a dessert we make at our cafe. It's a special canap959 topped with cheese and blueberries.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh! Blueberries! Dessert! You are worthy of being my subject as well!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh! Blueberries! Dessert! You are worthy of being my subject as well!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, I'm disappointed in you, Nicole. How can a subject of mine be scared of such a small and cute creature?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, I'm disappointed in you, Nicole. How can a subject of mine be scared of such a small and cute creature?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, I'm disappointed in you, Nicole. How can a subject of mine be scared of such a small and cute creature?

records.m_Talk_DEU: Purrr...

records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I can't help that I'm afraid of cats!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I can't help that I'm afraid of cats!

records.m_Talk_DEU: Just look at those stiff ears and glaring eyes!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just look at those stiff ears and glaring eyes!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The moment I put my guard down, he'll rush at me and scratch my face!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Meow...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Meow...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Meow...

records.m_Talk_FRA: Would you like to take the treats and play with the cat outside, little lady? I doubt I'll be able to say hello if your bartender remains crouched in the corner.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you worry! I shall take good care of the kitty!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, this is an embarrassing first impression to make on our neighbor.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, this is an embarrassing first impression to make on our neighbor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. It's my fault that I brought my cat without any warning.

records.m_Talk_FRA: No. It's my fault that I brought my cat without any warning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just heard there was a cute girl here, and I figured she'd be interested in seeing a cute pet.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I just heard there was a cute girl here, and I figured she'd be interested in seeing a cute pet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Guess the rumors were true. She's adorable. Even the horn accessory fits her well.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah... Yeah. A lot of our regulars come to see Momo too.

records.m_Talk_FRA: It's okay. I just have a good sense of smell because of my job.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I found it smells so good that I'm considering buying one for myself.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I found it smells so good that I'm considering buying one for myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well. Our manager gave it to me. I'll ask her what it is and let you know the next time you come over.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'd be grateful for that. I do like cocktails, so I'll make sure to come by again.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I'd be grateful for that. I do like cocktails, so I'll make sure to come by again.

records.m_Talk_FRA: A margarita, please. And make it virgin at that. I have to go back to my shop right after.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An employee from a nearby cafe came to visit while I was away?
records.m_Talk_DEU: An employee from a nearby cafe came to visit while I was away?
records.m_Talk_FRA: An employee from a nearby cafe came to visit while I was away?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. She said she works at a dessert cafe. Her style and manner were very sophisticated.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. She said she works at a dessert cafe. Her style and manner were very sophisticated.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Cafe Strega, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cafe Strega, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How did you know?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How did you know?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How did you know?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Simple. There's only one dessert cafe in Ground One where a cat is its mascot.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Simple. There's only one dessert cafe in Ground One where a cat is its mascot.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The canap959 she gave us was delicious! It paired well with wine too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll stop by there every now and then and buy us desserts. Do you like cookies, Gremory?

records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll stop by there every now and then and buy us desserts. Do you like cookies, Gremory?

records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, has our little majesty already gone to bed?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Unlike me, who's afraid of cats... Hah hah.

records.m_Talk_FRA: That's odd. Nicole Primer, who is fearless in the face of criminal organizations, is afraid of cats?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We shall take that child as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But sir, she did not pass the third test.

records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter. It was decided after her first test.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I dare not doubt your intentions, but there has been no precedent for selecting failed candidates.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I dare not doubt your intentions, but there has been no precedent for selecting failed candidates.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Do these decisions not contradict the Investigation Council's doctrine?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We do not think that talent is all of one's potential.

records.m_Talk_FRA: We do not think that talent is all of one's potential.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you saw it too, did you not? She gave up the test for a cat.

records.m_Talk_FRA: But you saw it too, did you not? She gave up the test for a cat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the first test was seeing one's talent in shooting a gun, the third was to see one's unwavering determination in the face of conflict.

records.m_Talk_FRA: If the first test was seeing one's talent in shooting a gun, the third was to see one's unwavering determination in the face of conflict.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I worry that her tender heart might get in her way one day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I concur.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I concur.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I concur.

root.m_Talk_ENG: From a young age, Sister Primer had a strong sense of justice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: From a young age, Sister Primer had a strong sense of justice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: From a young age, Sister Primer had a strong sense of justice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: At the age of ten, she fought against gangsters while bringing back the children who snuck out...
root.m_Talk_DEU: At the age of ten, she fought against gangsters while bringing back the children who snuck out...
root.m_Talk_FRA: At the age of ten, she fought against gangsters while bringing back the children who snuck out...

root.m_Talk_ENG: And on the year of her coming of age ceremony, she even chased out a terrorist organization that was trying to take over the monastery.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And on the year of her coming of age ceremony, she even chased out a terrorist organization that was trying to take over the monastery.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And on the year of her coming of age ceremony, she even chased out a terrorist organization that was trying to take over the monastery.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, I am proud of her. Looking at Sister Primer, I am confident that she would not turn her back on any injustice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, I am proud of her. Looking at Sister Primer, I am confident that she would not turn her back on any injustice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, I am proud of her. Looking at Sister Primer, I am confident that she would not turn her back on any injustice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is also why I am concerned about her. One day, she will destroy herself by attempting to handle justice she is incapable of handling.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is also why I am concerned about her. One day, she will destroy herself by attempting to handle justice she is incapable of handling.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is also why I am concerned about her. One day, she will destroy herself by attempting to handle justice she is incapable of handling.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So when the priests of the Holy Curia came to visit, I made Sister Primer take the test.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So when the priests of the Holy Curia came to visit, I made Sister Primer take the test.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So when the priests of the Holy Curia came to visit, I made Sister Primer take the test.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If she were to become an official exorcist and gain the necessary strength, her righteousness would grow even stronger.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If she were to become an official exorcist and gain the necessary strength, her righteousness would grow even stronger.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If she were to become an official exorcist and gain the necessary strength, her righteousness would grow even stronger.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you have done your research, you will understand that becoming an exorcist is not an easy task. Above all, one must pass three tests before being recognized by the Holy Curia.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you have done your research, you will understand that becoming an exorcist is not an easy task. Above all, one must pass three tests before being recognized by the Holy Curia.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you have done your research, you will understand that becoming an exorcist is not an easy task. Above all, one must pass three tests before being recognized by the Holy Curia.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sister Primer may have failed her final exam, but after much deliberation, the priests decided to accept her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sister Primer may have failed her final exam, but after much deliberation, the priests decided to accept her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sister Primer may have failed her final exam, but after much deliberation, the priests decided to accept her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps it is because the previous two tests sufficiently demonstrated her qualifications to become an exorcist.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps it is because the previous two tests sufficiently demonstrated her qualifications to become an exorcist.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps it is because the previous two tests sufficiently demonstrated her qualifications to become an exorcist.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What was the last test she failed, you ask?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What was the last test she failed, you ask?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What was the last test she failed, you ask?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, even the courageous Sister Primer is afraid of something.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, even the courageous Sister Primer is afraid of something.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, even the courageous Sister Primer is afraid of something.

root.m_Talk_ENG: WHOAA!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: WHOAA!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: WHOAA!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't know Nicole could scream like that. How strange.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't know Nicole could scream like that. How strange.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't know Nicole could scream like that. How strange.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Momo! Th-there's... a c-cat... in the bar!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Momo! Th-there's... a c-cat... in the bar!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Momo! Th-there's... a c-cat... in the bar!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A cat?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A cat?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A cat?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, excuse me. It seems my little colleague scared your bartender.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, excuse me. It seems my little colleague scared your bartender.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, excuse me. It seems my little colleague scared your bartender.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Meow?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Meow?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Meow?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What a suspicious customer, bringing a cat to a bar. Reveal yourself!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What a suspicious customer, bringing a cat to a bar. Reveal yourself!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What a suspicious customer, bringing a cat to a bar. Reveal yourself!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I work at a nearby cafe. I came to say hello after hearing about the new bar that had opened.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I work at a nearby cafe. I came to say hello after hearing about the new bar that had opened.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I work at a nearby cafe. I came to say hello after hearing about the new bar that had opened.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you the manager?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you the manager?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you the manager?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tedious tasks like managing are done by my subject, Gremory. But she's out right now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tedious tasks like managing are done by my subject, Gremory. But she's out right now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tedious tasks like managing are done by my subject, Gremory. But she's out right now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If the manager is your subject, what do you do, little lady?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If the manager is your subject, what do you do, little lady?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If the manager is your subject, what do you do, little lady?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can make sweet juice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can make sweet juice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can make sweet juice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I guess, being as cute as you are, you would still attract a large number of customers even if you did nothing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I guess, being as cute as you are, you would still attract a large number of customers even if you did nothing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I guess, being as cute as you are, you would still attract a large number of customers even if you did nothing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hao dayr you. Hao dayr you pin'h ma sheeks la'ch dat?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hao dayr you. Hao dayr you pin'h ma sheeks la'ch dat?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hao dayr you. Hao dayr you pin'h ma sheeks la'ch dat?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, right. This is a dessert we make at our cafe. It's a special canap959 topped with cheese and blueberries.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, right. This is a dessert we make at our cafe. It's a special canap959 topped with cheese and blueberries.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, right. This is a dessert we make at our cafe. It's a special canap959 topped with cheese and blueberries.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh! Blueberries! Dessert! You are worthy of being my subject as well!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh! Blueberries! Dessert! You are worthy of being my subject as well!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh! Blueberries! Dessert! You are worthy of being my subject as well!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, I'm disappointed in you, Nicole. How can a subject of mine be scared of such a small and cute creature?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, I'm disappointed in you, Nicole. How can a subject of mine be scared of such a small and cute creature?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, I'm disappointed in you, Nicole. How can a subject of mine be scared of such a small and cute creature?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Purrr...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Purrr...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Purrr...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-I can't help that I'm afraid of cats!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I can't help that I'm afraid of cats!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I can't help that I'm afraid of cats!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just look at those stiff ears and glaring eyes!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just look at those stiff ears and glaring eyes!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just look at those stiff ears and glaring eyes!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The moment I put my guard down, he'll rush at me and scratch my face!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The moment I put my guard down, he'll rush at me and scratch my face!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The moment I put my guard down, he'll rush at me and scratch my face!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Meow...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Meow...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Meow...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Would you like to take the treats and play with the cat outside, little lady? I doubt I'll be able to say hello if your bartender remains crouched in the corner.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Would you like to take the treats and play with the cat outside, little lady? I doubt I'll be able to say hello if your bartender remains crouched in the corner.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Would you like to take the treats and play with the cat outside, little lady? I doubt I'll be able to say hello if your bartender remains crouched in the corner.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you worry! I shall take good care of the kitty!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you worry! I shall take good care of the kitty!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you worry! I shall take good care of the kitty!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's all right now. The cat's gone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's all right now. The cat's gone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's all right now. The cat's gone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, this is an embarrassing first impression to make on our neighbor.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, this is an embarrassing first impression to make on our neighbor.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, this is an embarrassing first impression to make on our neighbor.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. It's my fault that I brought my cat without any warning.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. It's my fault that I brought my cat without any warning.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. It's my fault that I brought my cat without any warning.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I just heard there was a cute girl here, and I figured she'd be interested in seeing a cute pet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I just heard there was a cute girl here, and I figured she'd be interested in seeing a cute pet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I just heard there was a cute girl here, and I figured she'd be interested in seeing a cute pet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Guess the rumors were true. She's adorable. Even the horn accessory fits her well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Guess the rumors were true. She's adorable. Even the horn accessory fits her well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Guess the rumors were true. She's adorable. Even the horn accessory fits her well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah... Yeah. A lot of our regulars come to see Momo too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah... Yeah. A lot of our regulars come to see Momo too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah... Yeah. A lot of our regulars come to see Momo too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, I see that you have a good taste for perfumes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, I see that you have a good taste for perfumes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, I see that you have a good taste for perfumes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Really? Did I put on too much this morning?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Really? Did I put on too much this morning?

root.m_Talk_FRA: It's okay. I just have a good sense of smell because of my job.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I found it smells so good that I'm considering buying one for myself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I found it smells so good that I'm considering buying one for myself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I found it smells so good that I'm considering buying one for myself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well. Our manager gave it to me. I'll ask her what it is and let you know the next time you come over.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Well. Our manager gave it to me. I'll ask her what it is and let you know the next time you come over.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'd be grateful for that. I do like cocktails, so I'll make sure to come by again.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I'd be grateful for that. I do like cocktails, so I'll make sure to come by again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sounds good. Then how about one on the house? Is there a particular spirit you prefer?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Sounds good. Then how about one on the house? Is there a particular spirit you prefer?

root.m_Talk_DEU: A margarita, please. And make it virgin at that. I have to go back to my shop right after.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A margarita, please. And make it virgin at that. I have to go back to my shop right after.

root.m_Talk_ENG: An employee from a nearby cafe came to visit while I was away?
root.m_Talk_DEU: An employee from a nearby cafe came to visit while I was away?
root.m_Talk_FRA: An employee from a nearby cafe came to visit while I was away?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. She said she works at a dessert cafe. Her style and manner were very sophisticated.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. She said she works at a dessert cafe. Her style and manner were very sophisticated.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. She said she works at a dessert cafe. Her style and manner were very sophisticated.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Cafe Strega, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Cafe Strega, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Cafe Strega, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: How did you know?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How did you know?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How did you know?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Simple. There's only one dessert cafe in Ground One where a cat is its mascot.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Simple. There's only one dessert cafe in Ground One where a cat is its mascot.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Simple. There's only one dessert cafe in Ground One where a cat is its mascot.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The canap959 she gave us was delicious! It paired well with wine too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The canap959 she gave us was delicious! It paired well with wine too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The canap959 she gave us was delicious! It paired well with wine too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll stop by there every now and then and buy us desserts. Do you like cookies, Gremory?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll stop by there every now and then and buy us desserts. Do you like cookies, Gremory?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll stop by there every now and then and buy us desserts. Do you like cookies, Gremory?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. I like anything that pairs well with alcohol.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. I like anything that pairs well with alcohol.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. I like anything that pairs well with alcohol.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, has our little majesty already gone to bed?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, has our little majesty already gone to bed?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, has our little majesty already gone to bed?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. She was exhausted from playing with the cat all day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. She was exhausted from playing with the cat all day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. She was exhausted from playing with the cat all day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Unlike me, who's afraid of cats... Hah hah.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Unlike me, who's afraid of cats... Hah hah.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Unlike me, who's afraid of cats... Hah hah.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's odd. Nicole Primer, who is fearless in the face of criminal organizations, is afraid of cats?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's odd. Nicole Primer, who is fearless in the face of criminal organizations, is afraid of cats?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's odd. Nicole Primer, who is fearless in the face of criminal organizations, is afraid of cats?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, well... Something happened when I was little.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, well... Something happened when I was little.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, well... Something happened when I was little.

root.m_Talk_ENG: By the way. That customer. What did she order?
root.m_Talk_DEU: By the way. That customer. What did she order?
root.m_Talk_FRA: By the way. That customer. What did she order?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Her order? Um... It was a virgin margarita.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Her order? Um... It was a virgin margarita.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Her order? Um... It was a virgin margarita.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We shall take that child as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We shall take that child as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We shall take that child as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But sir, she did not pass the third test.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But sir, she did not pass the third test.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But sir, she did not pass the third test.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No matter. It was decided after her first test.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No matter. It was decided after her first test.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No matter. It was decided after her first test.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I dare not doubt your intentions, but there has been no precedent for selecting failed candidates.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I dare not doubt your intentions, but there has been no precedent for selecting failed candidates.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I dare not doubt your intentions, but there has been no precedent for selecting failed candidates.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Do these decisions not contradict the Investigation Council's doctrine?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Do these decisions not contradict the Investigation Council's doctrine?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Do these decisions not contradict the Investigation Council's doctrine?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We do not think that talent is all of one's potential.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We do not think that talent is all of one's potential.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We do not think that talent is all of one's potential.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But you saw it too, did you not? She gave up the test for a cat.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But you saw it too, did you not? She gave up the test for a cat.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But you saw it too, did you not? She gave up the test for a cat.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If the first test was seeing one's talent in shooting a gun, the third was to see one's unwavering determination in the face of conflict.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If the first test was seeing one's talent in shooting a gun, the third was to see one's unwavering determination in the face of conflict.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If the first test was seeing one's talent in shooting a gun, the third was to see one's unwavering determination in the face of conflict.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I worry that her tender heart might get in her way one day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I worry that her tender heart might get in her way one day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I worry that her tender heart might get in her way one day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I concur.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I concur.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I concur.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The actions of Sister Nicole exempt her from becoming an exorcist.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The actions of Sister Nicole exempt her from becoming an exorcist.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The actions of Sister Nicole exempt her from becoming an exorcist.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, the three tests presented by the Council are also a rite of finding three rationales.
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, the three tests presented by the Council are also a rite of finding three rationales.
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, the three tests presented by the Council are also a rite of finding three rationales.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And Sister Nicole has met one of those <color=#ffd34c>rationales</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And Sister Nicole has met one of those <color=#ffd34c>rationales</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And Sister Nicole has met one of those <color=#ffd34c>rationales</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...What is this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...What is this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...What is this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is the gun she chose before her first test.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is the gun she chose before her first test.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is the gun she chose before her first test.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A normal person would have never given it a glance, but she naturally reached for it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A normal person would have never given it a glance, but she naturally reached for it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A normal person would have never given it a glance, but she naturally reached for it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is why I selected her as a candidate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is why I selected her as a candidate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is why I selected her as a candidate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Have you said goodbye to all the other sisters?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Have you said goodbye to all the other sisters?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Have you said goodbye to all the other sisters?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, sir!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, sir!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, sir!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then please, take this. It will be your companion throughout your journey.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then please, take this. It will be your companion throughout your journey.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then please, take this. It will be your companion throughout your journey.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, thank you! I'll keep it well!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, thank you! I'll keep it well!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, thank you! I'll keep it well!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But, does it have a name?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But, does it have a name?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But, does it have a name?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ho-oh, you are the first to ask the name of an object before your master-to-be.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Ho-oh, you are the first to ask the name of an object before your master-to-be.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh... Huh?! I-I'm sorry!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is called Agathe. It will be your friend as you face the trials ahead.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is called Agathe. It will be your friend as you face the trials ahead.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is called Agathe. It will be your friend as you face the trials ahead.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Agathe... It sounds really familiar to me!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Agathe... It sounds really familiar to me!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is a precious piece of treasure for us and for you. So please cherish it.

root.m_Talk_FRA: It is a precious piece of treasure for us and for you. So please cherish it.

root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay! You have my word, sir!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay! You have my word, sir!
